issues.description: Trigger 'OnPlay' is incorrect. This is a static ability that applies when the card is on board, not when played. Should use 'Trigger' or be a passive effect without trigger.
Condition checks 'HasCardOnBoard' (Leader on board) but the effect should check if Leader HAS the <Slash> attribute. Should be 'LeaderHasType' with type 'Slash'.
Missing the first effect: 'This card in your hand cannot be played by effects' - a static restriction that should prevent PlayFromHand/PlaySelf actions when triggered by effects.

Missing the KO protection action. The card 'cannot be K.O.'d in battle by <Slash> attribute cards' - this requires a defensive action or keyword like 'Unaffected' or a specific KO prevention condition.

suggestedDsl.effectText: This card in your hand cannot be played by effects. If your Leader has the <Slash> attribute, this Character cannot be K.O.'d in battle by <Slash> attribute cards and gains +1000 power.
